# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that runs directly on the master node for faster execution. The pipeline performs builds, runs tests, and deploys to production. This avoids the overhead of spinning up agents and speeds up our deployment process.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
  agent { label 'master' }

  options {
    timestamps()
    disableConcurrentBuilds()
    buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '30', artifactNumToKeepStr: '10'))
    timeout(time: 60, unit: 'MINUTES')
  }

  environment {
    APP_NAME = 'my-app'
    DEPLOY_ENV = 'production'
  }

  stages {
    stage('Checkout') {
      steps {
        checkout scm
      }
    }

    stage('Build') {
      steps {
        sh '''
          set -euo pipefail
          if [ -x ./gradlew ]; then
            ./gradlew --no-daemon clean assemble
          elif [ -f pom.xml ]; then
            mvn -B -U -DskipTests clean package
          elif [ -f package.json ]; then
            npm ci
            npm run build
          else
            echo "No recognized build tool found (gradle/maven/npm)."
            exit 1
          fi
        '''
      }
    }

    stage('Test') {
      steps {
        sh '''
          set -euo pipefail
          if [ -x ./gradlew ]; then
            ./gradlew --no-daemon test
          elif [ -f pom.xml ]; then
            mvn -B test
          elif [ -f package.json ]; then
            npm test
          else
            echo "No recognized test runner found (gradle/maven/npm)."
            exit 1
          fi
        '''
      }
      post {
        always {
          junit allowEmptyResults: true, testResults: '**/build/test-results/test/*.xml, **/target/surefire-reports/*.xml, **/target/failsafe-reports/*.xml'
        }
      }
    }

    stage('Deploy to Production') {
      when {
        branch 'main'
      }
      steps {
        input message: "Deploy ${env.APP_NAME} to ${env.DEPLOY_ENV}?", ok: 'Deploy'
        sh '''
          set -euo pipefail
          if [ -x ./gradlew ]; then
            if ./gradlew -q tasks --all | grep -qE '^deploy(\\s|$)'; then
              ./gradlew --no-daemon deploy
            else
              echo "No Gradle 'deploy' task found. Provide your deployment command."
              exit 1
            fi
          elif [ -f pom.xml ]; then
            if mvn -q -Dexec.executable=echo -Dexec.args=ok org.codehaus.mojo:exec-maven-plugin:3.1.0:exec >/dev/null 2>&1; then
              echo "Maven project detected. Provide your deployment command."
              exit 1
            else
              echo "Maven project detected. Provide your deployment command."
              exit 1
            fi
          elif [ -f package.json ]; then
            if npm run | grep -qE ' deploy(:prod)?'; then
              npm run deploy:prod || npm run deploy
            else
              echo "No npm deploy script found. Provide your deployment command."
              exit 1
            fi
          else
            echo "No recognized deployment method found."
            exit 1
          fi
        '''
      }
    }
  }

  post {
    failure {
      echo "Pipeline failed."
    }
    success {
      echo "Pipeline succeeded."
    }
  }
}
